title.en: Lord Baiheng and Lord Frostless were puzzled, n...

content.en:
"It's ......"

Lord Baiheng and Lord Frostless were puzzled, not knowing what was going on.

What's up with that fishhook?

At this time, the Dragon Gu Lord looked jealous and said, "Just now a peak Legendary Realm Lord made a move!"

"Who's that?"

Lord Frostless asked.

She had only recently entered the Legendary Realm Lord, and she was really unfamiliar with the lack of some ancient Legendary Realm Lords.

"It's the Frontier Lord of the Sea of Purgatory. "

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

Frontier Lords?

Neither the Frostless Lord nor the Baiheng Lord had heard of this Legendary Realm Lord.

Lord of the Barren River introduced: "The Lord of the Frontier is an incomparably ancient Peak Legendary Realm Lord, very low-key, likes to disguise himself as an old man to fish in one world after another, and occasionally mention the juniors, he can be regarded as a Peak Legendary Realm Lord who does not have disputes with foreign affairs and foreign objects. It stands to reason that the Trick Star Lord has nothing to do with the Border Lord, so why did the Border Lord go to save the Trick Star Lord?"

The Lord of the Barren River didn't understand, and the other Legendary Realm Lords were also puzzled.

"Maybe it's cause and effect!"

Lord Longgu guessed.

Causally!

Many creatures have no cause and effect from this world, and they have jumped beyond the scope of this world, but as long as they are in the 143 Void Zone, they will be affected by cause and effect if they do not become the ones who control them.

Some causes and effects are small and can be ignored, but some causes and effects are very large, and if the Peak Legends Realm wants to attack the Eternal Master in the future, these causes and effects must be ended.

Causality is a factor that controls time and space, and affects the integration of time and space, which can be ignored but not ignored.

If that's the case, it's unlikely that they'll want to kill the Star Lord.

-

The immeasurable sea, a world in front of the lakeside.

An old man was fishing, and suddenly the hook caught a person out of nothingness, and this person was the Lord of the Stars.

And when he fished the Trick Star Lord over, the traces of the cut were all erased by him, and the ordinary Legendary Realm Lord couldn't chase and kill him at all, and he didn't dare to chase and kill him.

At this time, the Lord of the Strange Star was a little confused, and naturally he was suddenly fished away.

When he saw the old man, he didn't know it, it was a stranger.

However, he was able to guess who the old man in front of him was.

There are very few Legendary Realm Lords who can catch him with a single fishing hook, and there is only one Legendary Realm Lord who likes to use a fishing hook, and that is the Frontier Lord.

"Thank you to the Border Lord for saving your life"

Lord Ship thanked.

"Do you know why I saved you?"

The Lord of the Circle asked with a smile.

"I don't know. "

The Trick Star Lord really doesn't know, he has nothing to do with the border lord at all, and the border lord is really low-key and doesn't participate in any major things, and he also knows why the border lord saved him.

"Your master is my disciple, although he has not become a Legendary Realm Lord, but for his sake, I must save you once, but only once, understand?" said the border lord.

The Star Lord was shocked.

He did have a master, a half-step legendary realm, and a long time ago he went to a forbidden place to seek a chance to break through, but he fell and died.

I didn't expect that my master would have such a big background, he was a disciple of the border lord, and he seemed to be a real descendant disciple, otherwise he would not have let the border lord personally come to save his life.

"Thank you, Master!"

The Star Lord hurriedly pulled the relationship and said.

"Don't call me Master, the relationship between you and me is broken, your Master is my disciple, but you are not my disciple, understand?" The Border Lord knew what the Trick Star Lord thought, if he admitted it, the Trick Star Lord would hang his name.

"Yes!"

The Star Lord was a little disappointed.

Suddenly.

The Frontier Lord was gone, he could barely see it.

"What a terrifying strength, the border lord not only controls time and space, I'm afraid that he is fused with space and time, but he also has a certain attainment, otherwise he can't easily fish me in, let alone shield my perception, and leave silently. "

The Star Lord muttered.

It's a pity that such a peak Legendary Realm Lord, he didn't succeed in getting a relationship, otherwise he would almost be able to walk sideways in the Infinite Sea in the future, who would dare to provoke him?

Immediately, he remembered his own Strange Star Tower

I'm afraid that the Star Tower will be gone, after all, even the Star Lord has died in battle.

So, he contacted some half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Some of the half-step Legendary Realm lords fell, and some were still alive, but even if they were alive, they didn't dare to stay in the Infinite Sea, and fled directly to other Eternal Seas, lest they be hunted down by the True Immortal Land.

Some even joined other forces to seek refuge.

Soon, the Star Lord knew the general situation.

The Strange Star Tower is indeed gone, and it has been destroyed

"How's Shatterstar?"

The Star Lord hurriedly contacted the Star Shatter Lord, but he couldn't get in touch.

At this time, he had an idea.

I'm afraid the shattered star has fallen!

Shattered Star is his most optimistic junior, and he has devoted all his energy to it, and he even wants to train Shatterstar to become a Legendary Realm Lord, and he gave Shattered Star a grain of empty sea gravel, and integrated it into the Eternal Arcana, just to enhance his life-saving ability and combat effectiveness.

However, the shattered star still fell.

The fall of the Star Lord, he was just sorry, but he was not so sad, after all, the Star Lord could only be regarded as a partner, one of the founders of the Tricky Star Tower, but the Broken Star was his true blood descendant, a disciple, and the relationship was completely different.

"There is no holy place !!!"

The Star Lord gritted his teeth, eager to find the True Immortal Land and fight hard, but he didn't dare.

"There is no holy land, who killed my broken star?"

He couldn't take revenge on the True Void Holy Land, but it wasn't difficult to take revenge on a half-step Legendary Realm in the True Void Holy Land.

In his opinion, it must have been a certain half-step Legendary Realm in the True Saintless Land who killed the Shattered Star.

This kind of thing can be investigated, but it must wait for this matter to pass, otherwise the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land is still staring at him, and it will be difficult for him to do it.

There is no holy place.

Ye Tian is back, and when the Frostless Lord and they also come back, Ye Tian will come to find the Frostless Lord.

And Ye Tian's copy body was naturally self-annihilated, lest he leave evidence and let other Legendary Realm Lords spy on his existence.

This time, Ye Tian came to find the Frostless Lord, just to take out that grain of empty sea gravel from that eternal treasure

Frost-free Lord's Palace.

Ye Tian is here.

"Endless Lord, we haven't killed the Star Lord, and we haven't found a single grain of empty sea gravel at the moment. "

The Frostless Lord said.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "Lord Frostless, I found it!"
